appraisal_events.evidence: « Françoise, qui ne pouvait pas entendre parler d'un malheur arrivé à un inconnu, même dans une partie du monde éloignée, sans commencer à gémir. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator characterizes Françoise as someone who reflexively moans at any report of misfortune, even distant, which locally frames her as overreactive and slightly reduces her standing.

status_effects.explanation: She is presented as habitually lamenting, which gently lowers her evaluation in this scene.
